home.eyebrow: Scent discovery based on how you feel

finalCta.title: Your perfect fragrance starts with understanding yourself.

quick.summary: You seem to lean toward {axes} fragrances.

teaser.title: Want to know WHY these fragrances fit you?
teaser.text: Discover your personal fragrance identity and understand what makes these recommendations uniquely yours.

profile.title: This is your Scent Signature
profile.lead: A unique scent profile built from your answers — every recommendation is based on it.

identity.title: Here's what we understand about you

statements.freshOverSweet: You enjoy freshness more than sweetness.
statements.subtleLuxury: You appreciate subtle luxury over loud attention.
statements.floralSoul: You're drawn to soft, expressive floral character.
statements.cleanAiry: You gravitate toward clean, airy freshness.
statements.warmDepth: You're drawn to warm, comforting depth.
statements.grounded: You feel at home in grounded, woody warmth.
statements.balanced: You naturally prefer elegant, clean and balanced fragrances.

name.lead: A name that captures the mood you carry.

minimalist.name: The Minimalist
minimalist.desc: You value clarity and restraint — clean, quiet scents that feel effortless and refined.

explorer.name: The Explorer
explorer.desc: You're curious and open — airy, expansive scents that feel like fresh horizons.

gentleman.name: The Gentleman
gentleman.desc: You carry quiet authority — warm woods and leather with timeless elegance.

dreamer.name: The Dreamer
dreamer.desc: You feel deeply — soft florals and gentle sweetness with a romantic soul.

adventurer.name: The Adventurer
adventurer.desc: You chase the next horizon — bold fresh-woody scents built for movement.

creator.name: The Creator
creator.desc: You blend the unexpected — rich, layered scents with artistic depth.

collector.name: The Collector
collector.desc: You savor richness — deep amber, leather and gourmand with a luxurious presence.

freeSpirit.name: The Free Spirit
freeSpirit.desc: You follow feeling — bright florals and fresh air with a light, joyful heart.

report.title: Now, why each one is yours
report.lead: Because we understand you, every match comes with a reason.
report.reason: Recommended because your profile has a strong {family} character.

about.title: About Us
about.lead: Odora discovers your scent with you.
about.p1: Choosing a perfume among hundreds of options is overwhelming. We made it simple: with a few short questions about your mood and taste, we turn your scent preferences into a numeric profile and suggest the closest matches from dozens of famous perfumes.
about.p2: No ads and no sales bias — just a real match between your taste and each perfume's character.

values.title: Personalized
values.text: Suggestions are built from your own answers, not from bestseller lists.

values.title: Transparent
values.text: For every perfume you see how close it is to your taste — and why.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.lead: Questions, suggestions or partnership? We'd love to hear from you.

gender.title: What style are you looking for?
gender.subtitle: Your choice also tunes the site's colors to match your taste.
gender.changeHint: You can change your choice anytime

moment.title: Which moment feels most like you?

families.title: Rate each scent family
families.subtitle: Rate each one from 1 (low) to 5 (high) based on how much you like it

occasion.title: Where will you wear it most?

strength.title: How strong do you like it?

woody.name: Woody
woody.desc: Warm and dry, like sandalwood and cedar

citrus.name: Citrus
citrus.desc: Fresh and lively, like lemon and bergamot

floral.name: Floral
floral.desc: Soft and romantic, like rose and jasmine

sweet.name: Sweet
sweet.desc: Cozy and warm, like vanilla and caramel

spicy.name: Spicy
spicy.desc: Warm and passionate, like cinnamon and cardamom

oud.name: Oud / Musky
oud.desc: Deep and luxurious, like oud and musk

aquatic.name: Aquatic
aquatic.desc: Cool and clean, like sea breeze and rain

results.title: Your Result
results.subtitle: Based on your taste, these are your closest matches
results.shareText: Check out my perfume test result on Odora!
results.sharedNote: This result was shared with you — you can take the test too.
results.empty: You haven't taken the test yet.

catalog.title: Perfume Collection
catalog.subtitle: {count} famous perfumes in the Odora database

favorites.title: My Favorites
favorites.empty: You haven't hearted any perfume yet. Start from the Collection!
favorites.needAccount: Sign in to your account first to add favorites.
favorites.needAccountLead: Favorites are tied to your account so they follow you on any device — sign in or create an account first.

account.title: Account
account.name: Name
account.errNoAccount: No account with this email — use the Sign up tab.
account.errEmailExists: This email already has an account — use the Sign in tab.
account.errServer: Could not reach the server — try again.
account.localNote: Your account lives on the Odora server; sign in from any device and your favorites and gift history follow you.

giftTest.createLead: Want to gift someone a perfume but don't know their taste? Send them a test link: they answer a few short questions, only YOU receive the result, and they won't know which perfume you picked until the moment you hand them the gift!
giftTest.needAccountText: Gift test results are stored in your account panel — so create an account first (just a name and email, ten seconds!)
giftTest.yourEmail: Your email (the result will also be sent here)
giftTest.linkReady: Your gift test link is ready! 🎉
giftTest.linkHint: Send this link to the recipient — the whole thing, from http to the end:
giftTest.copied: Link copied! Now send it to the recipient.
giftTest.copyManual: Automatic copy was blocked — copy the link from the box above manually (long-press / Ctrl+C).
giftTest.freeNote: The result is stored in your account panel and every link works exactly once. Automatic email delivery is coming soon.
giftTest.landTitle: A gift is on its way! 🎁
giftTest.landLead: {name} wants to pick a perfume just for you. Answer a few short questions about your taste so they can make the best choice.
giftTest.landNote: The result is a surprise — you won't see it! 😉
giftTest.doneLead: Your answers were sent to {name} — now wait for your gift! Don't worry, we won't show you anything so the surprise stays safe. 😉
giftTest.doneQuote: “A beautiful scent is a memory that never fades.”
giftTest.usedTitle: This link has already been used
giftTest.usedText: Every gift test link works exactly once. If you think this is a mistake, ask the sender to create a new link.
giftTest.serverError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again — your answers are safe.
giftTest.historyEmpty: You haven't created any gift links yet.
giftTest.historyOffline: Could not load the history from the server — try again later.

common.comingSoon: This section will be built in the next phase.
